query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier, cp.projectId, p.name as projectName
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE cp.projectId IN ('690089','570022','330033','660020','120267','210028')
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY cp.projectId, c.name
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.contactTrustTier, cp.projectId, p.name as projectName
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE cp.projectId IN ('690089','570022','330033','660020','120267','210028')
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
ORDER BY cp.projectId, c.name
LIMIT 20;
